calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-09-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Janet Pond

Petitioner Elsa Ying Rong Hu present for minor, with interpreter William Guan, in pro per, was sworn and examined.

The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to : Sabrina Ying-Hsin Hsu
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-16-2003 Reset To Oct-09-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-28-2003 Reset To Oct-07-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Patricia M. Evezich #1193.
Petitioner, Elsa Ying Rong Hu present in pro per and with Mandarin Interpreter, William Quan, was sworn and examined. Petition is lack of the minor's father signature, this matter is continued to Oct. 7, 2003 at 09:00 am. for the petitioner to serve notice on the minor's father at the last known address by mail with proof of service.
